transcript: Speaker A: English na weakness kadu. Kaani adi anni slow chestondi. Na career lo conversations chala fast ga move avvali. Nenu cheppali anukunna points clear ga undevi. Kaani fast ga, clarity tho cheppalekapoyedanni. Anduke chala sarlu silent ga undipoyedanni. Appude naku oka important realization vachindi. Fluency ante grammar kadu. Fluency ante speed mariyu clarity ani. English fluency kosam search chestunte naku SpeakX dorikindi. SpeakX exact ga vati meede focus chestundi. Roju speaking practice cheyistundi. Indulo structured exercises untayi. Mana progress antha screen meeda visibly ga kanipistundi. Deenilo AI assistant kooda untundi. Adi mana English speaking flow ni correct chestundi. Time pass ayye koddi nenu faster ga respond avutunnanu. Clear ga matladutunnanu. Career lo real difference kanipistondi. Conversations lo venakabadakandi. SpeakX tho fluency ni correct way lo train cheyandi. Download SpeakX now. [English is not my weakness. But it slows everything down. In my career, conversations need to move very fast. The points I wanted to say were clear. But I couldn't say them fast and with clarity. That's why many times I used to remain silent. That's when I had an important realization. Fluency is not grammar. Fluency means speed and clarity. While searching for English fluency, I found SpeakX. SpeakX focuses exactly on those. It makes you practice speaking daily. It has structured exercises. All our progress is visibly seen on the screen. It also has an AI assistant. It corrects our English speaking flow. As time passes, I am responding faster. I am speaking clearly. I can see a real difference in my career. Don't lag behind in conversations. Train your fluency in the correct way with SpeakX. Download SpeakX now.]
on_screen_text: English na Weekness Kadu [English is not my weakness], SpeakX POWERED BY AI, Download SpeakX Now
summary: A professional woman explains how slow English communication held her back in her career despite knowing the language. She shares how SpeakX helped her practice daily and speak with speed and clarity using AI feedback. She invites users to download the app to boost their career confidence.
